questions.question: On 15 May 2025, the Supreme Court of India issued an immediate direction to the Centre to set up dedicated courts to deal with which cases?
According to a Times of India report from April 2025, there have been plans to locally manufacture which tetravalent dengue vaccine under the ‘Make‑in‑India’ initiative?
Who among the following was appointed as the new Chairman of the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) in May 2025?

In April 2025, which startup, selected by the Department of Science and Technology (DST) under the National Quantum Mission (NQM), has launched the world’s first platform — QShield — that enables seamless cryptography management?
The 'Montreal Protocol' was signed to control the emission of _____.
In March 2025, ________ became the 28ᵗʰ legislature to join the National e-Vidhan Application platform.
Which of the following organisations collaborated with the Indian Navy for the VLSRSAM launch in March 2025?
Which Ministry co-organised the 9ᵗʰ edition of the Global Technology Summit (GTS) with Carnegie India in April 2025 in New Delhi?
questions.option_1: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.question: Which country led the 2024 Global Gender Gap Report by closing over 90% of its gender gap?
Which of the following indigenously developed underwater naval mines was successfully tested by DRDO and the Indian Navy in May 2025?
The new Indian Ports Bill 2025 seeks to repeal which Indian Act?
questions.option_1: The Indian Bills of Lading Act, 1856

questions.question: The International Theatre Festival of India, Bharat Rang Mahotsav (BRM), held in Bengaluru from 1 February 2025 to 8 February 2025, was organised by which of the following institutions?
Who was honoured with the Luminous Lummer Dai Literary Award in 2025 for their contributions to Assamese literature?
In which State has India’s first integrated API Green Hydrogen and 2G Ethanol plant been established?
In May 2025, Prime Minister Narendra Modi dedicated 103 redeveloped railway stations under which of the following schemes?
In March 2025, which company unveiled Vayu, an overall AI cloud offering for enterprises?
What was the theme of the 10ᵗʰ Governing Council Meeting of NITI Aayog that was held on 24 May 2025?
In May 2025, the Ministry of Education launched a nationwide enforcement drive around schools and colleges for what purpose?
questions.option_2: Making educational institutions free from tobacco and substance
questions.option_3: Improving safety measures for female students
questions.option_4: Promote positive campus culture and prevent incidents of ragging

questions.question: Which of the following two rice varieties were unveiled as a part of India's genome-editing initiative in May 2025?
questions.option_1: Pusa DST Rice 2 and Swarna Rice

questions.question: Which district in Nagaland was officially declared as the state's 17ᵗʰ district in November 2024?
Which exercise in 2025 involved India and the United States focusing on amphibious warfare and HADR?

Which nationwide civil defence exercise, conducted on May 7, 2025 by the Ministry of Home Affairs and the National Disaster Management Authority, involved 244 districts across India to enhance emergency preparedness?
Which of the following countries does Amelia Kerr, the ICC Women’s T20I Cricketer of the Year 2024, represent?
According to the IMF’s World Economic Outlook released in April 2025, what is India's projected economic growth rate for the year 2025?
The Mudumal Megalithic Menhir is located in which state that was included in the tentative list of India by UNESCO World Heritage Centre in February 2025?
